nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 哥斯达黎加
nodes.summary: 哥斯达黎加是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联215种鸟类，包括Black guan、茶臉鶉、Spot-bellied bobwhite等215种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塔拉曼卡山脉
nodes.summary: 塔拉曼卡山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括高地大蜂鸟、靛喉寶石蜂鳥、Costa Rican pygmy owl等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 奇里基省
nodes.summary: 奇里基省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括高地大蜂鸟、青喉蜂鸟、靛喉寶石蜂鳥等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 烏鴝鶇
nodes.summary: 烏鴝鶇（Sooty thrush，学名 Turdus nigrescens），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括气候变化。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Costa Rica and Panama. It was formerly known as the sooty robin.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Costa Rica's Cordillera Central and Cordillera de Talamanca; the latter range extends into far western Panama's Chiriquí Province. In the Cordillera Central it occurs on volcanos separated by low passes, and a major valley separates them from the Cordillera de Talamanca. The sooty thrush inhabits the edges of montane evergreen forest, semi-humid to humid montane scrublands, and second-growth scrublands in the subtropical and temperate zones

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified, though shifting and alteration of its habitat due to climate change is expected in the future. It is considered common above in Costa Rica and uncommon to fairly common in Panama with higher numbers at higher elevation
